name: adazella-dev-kit
description: Adazella Agent Development Kit. 5-layer Claude Code setup with orchestrator + parallel agent team. Install once → every teammate gets the same superpowers.
author: Sustainaura LLC

agents._comment_team: Agent Team — orchestrator dispatches these in parallel for multi-layer features
agents._comment_specialist: Specialist agents — invoked individually for QA / review / focused tasks

_workflow._description: Two ways to use the agents:
_workflow.1_simple_task: Invoke ONE specialist (e.g. code-reviewer) for focused work. Same context window.
_workflow.2_complex_feature: Invoke orchestrator → it dispatches setup-agent + api-agent + frontend-agent IN PARALLEL → each has own context → faster + cleaner main session

_install_instructions: 2. .claude/ directory comes with the repo (already in git)
4. Their Claude Code instance picks up settings.json automatically
5. They get: same skills + agents + hooks + slash commands as you
